page_metadata.biotools__summary: Multi-platform (Windows and Linux) toolbox which covers all the steps of the iterative identification procedure: local and global sensitivity analysis, local and global ranking of parameters, parameter estimation, identifiability analysis and optimal experimental design.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Multi-platform (Windows and Linux) toolbox which covers all the steps of the iterative identification procedure: local and global sensitivity analysis, local and global ranking of parameters, parameter estimation, identifiability analysis and optimal experimental design.
